headline: HII, MetalCraft Marine Deliver Next-Generation Autonomous USV Prototypes for U.S. Marine Corps
summary: MCLEAN, Va., - HII , in partnership with MetalCraft Marine, has delivered and sea tested two unmanned surface vessels awarded in a Defense Innovation Unit contract for smaller form factor autonomous...
